question.text: Research analyst shall NOT deal in securities of the subject company in a manner contrary to the given recommendation. This applies to:

answer.text: Only the individual analyst and not associates
Independent analysts, part-time analysts, individuals employed as RAs, and their associates
Only institutional investors acting on the recommendation
Only the compliance officer of the research entity

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Regulation 16(3) applies broadly to independent RAs, part-time RAs, employed RAs, AND their associates. All are prohibited from trading contrary to recommendations. **The Trap:** The restriction extends to associates, not just the analyst personally. This prevents circumvention through related parties. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 14 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Associates include family members and entities with financial relationships. Monitor associate trading as carefully as analyst trading.
